zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱
zh.content:
ETH/USD最新价2314.59，24小时微涨0.22%，但仍低于SMA(20)的2318.6335，说明短线反弹力度有限，价格处于均线压制下方，趋势偏震荡整理。

MACD为-8.14449，显示动能仍偏空，虽然跌幅不大，但多头尚未形成有效放量。RSI缺失，需结合价格是否重新站上短期均线判断强弱切换。

短线支撑关注2305.71，若跌破可能下探2295附近；阻力位看2316.45及2318.63，若有效突破并站稳，才有望打开反弹空间。

交易上建议保持谨慎，激进者可在支撑附近轻仓试多，跌破2305止损；稳健者等待突破2320后再跟进，避免在窄幅震荡中追涨杀跌。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is trading in a very tight intraday range, with price at 2314.59 and only a 0.22% 24-hour gain. The market is slightly below the SMA(20) at 2318.63, suggesting near-term momentum remains mildly capped. Bulls need a clean move above 2318–2320 to shift the short-term bias positive.

The MACD reading of -8.14449 points to bearish momentum still present, though the narrow high-low range suggests selling pressure is not aggressive. RSI is unavailable, so confirmation from momentum is limited. A flat-to-slightly-bearish structure is more likely unless buyers reclaim the moving average with volume.

Immediate resistance sits near 2316.45, followed by 2318.63 and 2320. Support is near 2305.71; a break below that level could expose 2300 and potentially lower liquidity zones. Traders may consider cautious longs only above 2320, while shorts remain more attractive on rejection near resistance or a break below 2305.
